'''F-23-DKMx''', also known simply as '''F-23''', was a [[Gender/Legends|masculine]]<ref name="Star Tours" /> [[F series repair droid]]<ref name="Convenient Daily Departures: The History of Star Tours" /> with [[Color/Legends|blue]] [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]] and silver plating, with a blue trim.<ref name="Star Tours" /> By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4.3 ABY]],<ref name="KOTHB">{{Blog|holocron|7|Death Star timeline}}</ref> he was employed by the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency at their [[Tomorrowland Starport]]. Along with [[F-24-AMTx]], F-23 performed the final assembly of [[StarSpeeder 3000]] and serviced their [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]].<ref name="Complete Guide to Star Tours">''[[Complete Guide to Star Tours]]''</ref> He did not mind having to work overtime as the extra credits helped pay for his expensive tuition at the [[University of the Universe]].<ref name="Star Tours" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Works in the Hangar doing final assembly of Starspeeder 3000s.|F-23's description in ''Complete Guide to Star Tours''|<ref name="Complete Guide to Star Tours" />}}
F-23-DKMx was created for [[Tokyo Disneyland]]'s [[Wikipedia:Simulator ride|simulator ride]] [[Wikipedia:Amusement park|theme park]] attraction [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']], which opened on [[July 12]], [[1989]].<ref name="Star Tours" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] {{C|Tokyo only}}
